parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human speaking into a physical microphone with natural lighting and movements. The app UI elements are digitally overlaid.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged male, average build, light complexion. Short brown hair and light facial stubble.
Young adult female, slim build, light complexion. Short dark hair.

scenes.setting: Studio setting, dark background, large black microphone on a stand.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is positioned on the right side of the frame, facing slightly left towards a large black microphone on a stand. The background is a dark, solid color. The lighting highlights Character A's face and upper body. He uses hand gestures to emphasize his points while speaking.

scenes.visual_description: Character A speaks directly into a microphone in a studio setting. Large, dynamic text overlays appear in the center of the screen, highlighting key words from his speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: There are 45 million immigrants in the US and almost none of them were taught how to actually pronounce English.
Character A says: It's not your fault. English classes teach you grammar and vocabulary, not pronunciation.
Character A says: But pronunciation is the first thing people notice.
Character A says: There's this app called BoldVoice. You just speak into it.
Character A says: It gives you real-time feedback on your pronunciation and helps you fix your mistakes.
scenes.on_screen_text: 45 MILLION IMMIGRANTS ALMOST NONE TAUGHT HOW TO ACTUALLY PRONOUNCE ENGLISH IT'S NOT YOUR FAULT ENGLISH CLASSES TEACH YOU GRAMMAR AND VOCABULARY NOT PRONUNCIATION BUT PRONUNCIATION IS THE FIRST THING PEOPLE NOTICE THERE'S THIS APP CALLED BOLDVOICE YOU JUST SPEAK INTO IT IT GIVES YOU REAL-TIME FEEDBACK ON YOUR PRONUNCIATION AND HELPS YOU FIX YOUR MISTAKES Immigrant Career Coach for 10+ years

scenes.setting: Studio setting, dark background, large black microphone on a stand.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A remains in the same position, facing the microphone. He continues to speak and gesture with his hands. The background and lighting are unchanged from the previous scene.

scenes.visual_description: Character A continues speaking into the microphone. An inset graphic of a mobile phone screen appears on the right side, showing an app interface where a user practices pronouncing words. Dynamic text overlays continue to appear on the left side.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Sheep.
[music only, no speech]
Character A says: It's telling me I said 'ee' and I should say a shorter sound 'ih'.
Character A says: Ship.
[music only, no speech]
scenes.on_screen_text: SHEEP IT'S TELLING ME I SAID E AND I SHOULD SAY A SHORTER SOUND IH SHIP Practice My Text Coach Dani Let's start! Tap the button below and say the word. ship SH IH P Listening... 71% ship SH IH P Let's pause to troubleshoot. Listen to the difference in our recordings and try again. 100% ship SH IH P Awesome! You're ready for the next one.

scenes.setting: Studio setting, dark background, large black microphone on a stand.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is still in the same studio setup, speaking into the microphone. His expressions remain engaging as he concludes his pitch. The lighting and background are consistent.

scenes.visual_description: Character A finishes his explanation. Various inset graphics of the mobile app interface appear on the right, showing different features like video lessons with Character B and progress tracking. Dynamic text overlays continue to emphasize his spoken words.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Now I got it.
Character A says: I love this app because you learn from real accent coaches who show you how to pronounce each sound correctly.
Character A says: First, you'll take a speech test, and they'll personalize the lessons to what you need to focus on.
Character A says: It's cheaper than classes and only takes 10 minutes a day.
Character A says: Ready to sound more clear and confident? Download BoldVoice today.
scenes.on_screen_text: NOW I GOT IT I LOVE THIS APP BECAUSE YOU LEARN FROM REAL ACCENT COACHES WHO SHOW YOU HOW TO PRONOUNCE EACH SOUND CORRECTLY FIRST YOU'LL TAKE A SPEECH TEST AND THEY'LL PERSONALIZE THE LESSONS TO WHAT YOU NEED TO FOCUS ON IT'S CHEAPER THAN CLASSES AND ONLY TAKES 10 MINUTES A DAY READY TO SOUND MORE CLEAR AND CONFIDENT? DOWNLOAD BOLDVOICE TODAY Spelling vs. Sounds architect Coach Dani Strong work today, but we still have room for improvement. Make sure to bookmark words that give you a hard time. you need to say U For your Plan Complete these goals to earn a star 1. Use the term 'put a face to the name' 2. Say the phoneme Y UW 5 times 3. Use the suffix 'ing' 3 times Hi there! I'm Ka. It's great to meet you. What brought you to this networking event today? Hi Ka! I'm hoping to expand my connections and share about my company. Continue Conversation And now, take a look at the sounds that need some work. We'll start with these in our lessons together.
